lines: Brother Cassian’s tread assembly is locked beside the condenser. A damaged vox grille turns each breath into a burst of dry static.
"Identify purpose. The water queue has priority over ceremony."

choices.label: Ask what he hears beneath the condenser
Ask about Ash Chapel and Brother Job

lines: Cassian’s vox grille opens on a short burst of static.

choices.label: Say you found his tread at Ash Chapel

lines: The weapon mount settles one notch away from the water queue.

choices.label: Ask why he has not reported
Ask him to guard the water line first
Propose a shared road to Hallowfen

lines: "The buried metal carries a retired Hallowfen checkpoint reply. Its pattern is nineteen counts of pulse around six counts of silence."
"The checkpoint is silent. Something else uses its answer."

choices.label: Ask where he heard it first
Propose a shared road to Hallowfen

lines: "You read the tread correctly. I reached the first stone and reversed."
A fresh cut on his left breastplate reads ASH CHAPEL: WITHDREW.
"A clean report would not make the choice cleaner."

choices.label: Accuse him of leaving civilians behind

lines: "Active Host matter registered inside sealed Penitent steel. Brother Job answered through a body doctrine says cannot exist."
"Entering risked a second Engine, while destruction risked the only evidence. I lacked purge charge for either certainty."

choices.label: Ask why the wall code matters
Leave Ash Chapel in the record

lines: "Brother Job served as a scout on the Hallowfen perimeter. Order status: destroyed."
Cassian touches a worn name cut above the fresh chapel entry.
"His vox used private order cadence, then gave the checkpoint reply. The second signal did not belong in his throat."
"The reply belonged to a Hallowfen wall tower already absent from the road net."
"Either the tower still speaks where we cannot hear it, or the buried metal has learned its voice."
"I withdrew. Field judgment calls it defensible, but the plate remains incomplete."
"I do not record fear. I record reduced charge and impossible contamination, then add the number of civilians behind me."
Static breaks across Cassian’s grille.
"Accusation entered. It matches the plate."
"If condemnation produces a better next action, state it. If not, help me prevent a repeated line."
"Black Reliquary recovery law begins with fire. Hallowfen still contains civilians."
"A formal report is clean duty, while delay preserves evidence and risks spread. I have not found a clean tenderness."
"Request recorded. One watch at the water line costs no lost road day."
"Susanna asked for the same act without invoking your writ. Her formulation was stronger."
"Shared movement improves survival and contaminates both reports."
"Acceptable. I will decide final route after the condenser source is isolated."

choices.label: Leave the road open between you

lines: Cassian has cut the assembly outcome beneath the unfinished Ash Chapel entry on his breastplate.

choices.label: Ask what the Reliquary will do

lines: "I take the east shoulder and stop when the buried reply changes."
"Shared road does not mean shared judgment. State disagreement before the weapon turns."
"I will mark every culvert that carries the answer. Three cuts mean do not follow."
"If no marks remain, assume the road learned to remove them."
"Reliquary law favors fire because fire produces a clear report."
"I will include every living household between their certainty and Hallowfen."
"The pipe answered twice since the vote. I recorded both and woke no child."
"Go north. If the signal turns behind you, I am already facing it."
